creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next sunset date! ⬇️

Ruby Ru is a Parisian-style cocktail bar by the creek. It has a great sundowner offer and a terrace with a beautiful ambience. 

Check it out while the weather is still nice! 😉

📍 Ruby Ru, Marriott Marquis Dubai
🍹 What we had:
Ruby Ru Crispy: AED 55
Cheesy Spinach and Artichoke: AED 35
🌅 Ruby’s Hour (happy hour): 4-8 pm, Monday-Friday, Beverages from AED 27

Tag your date! 🌅

Ruby Ru • Dubai Sunset • Dubai Restaurant • Dubai Creek • Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: Out in the wind, I'm in the water Nobody's son, nobody's daughter Watching the chemtrails over the country clou-u-u-u-u-u-u-d
